issues.title: qwen-agent支持连接数据库，对表格进行数据分析么？

insights.community_engagement: Both closed WIP issues represent community-driven inquiries that evolved into completed features
insights.issue_216_summary: Community member inquired whether open-source Qwen models support function calling — a foundational capability for agent frameworks
insights.issue_102_summary: Community member explored database connectivity and tabular data analysis — demonstrating real-world enterprise use-case exploration
insights.development_timeline: Issues spanned from March to June 2024, both reaching closure by May 2026
insights.key_observation: The 'Work in Progress' label serves as a bridge between community feature requests and their eventual integration into the Qwen-Agent framework
